signals.headline: OKLAHOMA CITY THUNDER CLINCH #1 OVERALL PLAYOFF SEED | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
OKLAHOMA CITY THUNDER CLINCH #1 OVERALL PLAYOFF SEED | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Thunder secured the **NBA's best regular season record with their 64th win on Wednesday** (April 9, 2026), defeating the Clippers 128-110.[3] This clinched the top overall playoff seed for Oklahoma City, making them the defending champions and favorites for another title run.
